title: Hush-A-By Baby
content:
Hush-a-by baby on the tree-top,
    When the wind blows the cradle will rock;
    When the bough breaks the cradle will fall--
    Down comes baby, cradle and all!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "Hush-A-By Baby", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
